title.en: The forbidden path is all things in the realm, ...

content.en:
this day.

Ye Tian was contemplating the Forbidden Dao, and suddenly felt that the Forbidden Dao had stepped into another level, as if everything in the world was under the control of his forbidden rules, shaking the endless forbidden void with every move.

His forbidden path has broken through and he has entered the realm of all things!

The forbidden path is all things in the realm, and the flesh is in all things.

At this moment, Ye Tian ushered in another breakthrough, and his cultivation instantly broke through to the level of the realm of all things.

The body, the forbidden power, and the soul are skyrocketing!

Soon, the transformation was over, and Ye Tian officially stepped into the half-step domain ancestor level of the Ten Thousand Things Realm.

"My strength has become a lot stronger, and now my conventional combat power alone is enough to match the top Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor!

Ye Tian muttered.

What is the top Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor?

Only those who have cultivated to the Half-Step Domain Ancestor of the Great Perfection of the Returning Realm to the Great Perfection of the Returning Realm are only one step away from breaking through the Realm Ancestor level, and who have cultivated at least one forbidden Dao technique to the Perfection Realm, can be called the top Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor.

And Ye Tian's several forbidden dao techniques have all been cultivated to the consummation realm, but they are still one step away from the extreme realm, after all, his cultivation years are relatively short, even if he has a large number of forbidden talents, it is impossible to cultivate all the forbidden dao techniques to the extreme level at once.

Once he cultivated the Forbidden Dao Technique to the extreme level, his strength would be able to increase a lot.

After cultivating to the half-step domain ancestor level of the All Things Realm, the next thing to do is to continuously comprehend the All Things Realm Flesh Body and the Ten Thousand Things Realm Forbidden Dao, and strive to raise the All Things Realm Flesh Body and the All Things Realm Forbidden Dao to the consummation realm.

Once the physical body and the forbidden path have stepped into the consummation level of the realm of all things, when the time comes, all things will be one, and you can step into the half-step domain ancestor level of the realm of oneness.

"Now with my strength, there is no need to be afraid of anyone in this realm, even if I fight with the Frost Heaven Emperor Ancestor again, I am not weaker than him!"

Ye Tian said with full confidence.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to retreat, cultivating the Dao of the All Things Realm, also cultivating the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, and also comprehending the Forbidden Dao Technique.

Time just ticks by!

Every once in a while, some big things happen in the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, and many geniuses are born, making a great name in the entire Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, and the human race is no longer a small force under the Black Wind Mountain, but a huge force.

Even those Nine Heavens forces are not enough to see in front of the human race.

After all, the human race has a lot of invincible Dao Ancestors, a large number of Supreme Dao Ancestors, and countless ordinary Dao Ancestors.

Such a scale is too amazing, where is the ordinary Nine Heavens force strong by the human race!

Therefore, there are many Tianjiao who are born of the human race.

It can be said that not only the Terrans are developing rapidly, but other forces are also developing rapidly.

The Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm is also constantly expanding, and according to this trend, the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm will one day be promoted to the Forbidden Realm.

In the blink of an eye, tens of millions of years have passed from Xuanxu to the ancient realm.

this day.

Ouyang Jiu'er came to find Ye Tian.

"Brother Ye, I broke through!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said excitedly.

Ye Tian looked over and saw that Ouyang Jiu'er's aura was no longer at the level of an ordinary half-step domain ancestor, but a half-step domain ancestor in the realm of all things.

He was not at all surprised that Ouyang Jiu'er was able to break through to the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm.

Ouyang Jiu'er was also a Dao Ancestor promoted by the Supreme True Ancestor before, and her potential was naturally very high, many times higher than her previous life, she was able to break through to the half-step domain ancestor level in her previous life, and it was naturally not difficult to break through to the half-step domain ancestor level in the Ten Thousand Things Realm in this life.

It's just that Ouyang Jiu'er can't be assisted by the Eternal Source Stone Statue, so his cultivation is slower, so it took so long to ascend to the Half-Step Domain Ancestor Realm of the Ten Thousand Things Realm.

"That's right, with your strength, as long as you improve a little more, even the Heavenly Emperor Palace won't want to catch you easily!"

Ye Tian praised.

"Brother Ye, what level of strength have you reached?"

Ouyang Jiu'er said curiously.

Tens of millions of years ago, Ye Tian's conventional combat power had already reached the level of the top Returning One Realm Half-step Domain Ancestor, and the power of the Extreme Dao was comparable to the top Returning One Realm Half-step Domain Ancestor, and now that tens of millions of years have passed, it must be even stronger!

"Me!"

Ye Tian pondered for a while and said, "It's roughly equivalent to the Returning One Realm Perfect Combat Power!"

Over the past tens of millions of years, he has cultivated those forbidden Dao techniques to the extreme level one by one, and the Mixed Yuan Holy Body has stepped into the Xiaocheng realm, although the physical body and the forbidden Dao have not yet been raised to the consummation level of the realm of all things, the gap is not too big.

As a result, his conventional combat power suddenly soared to a level comparable to the top Returning Realm Perfection Combat Power, and once he exerted the power of the Extreme Dao, he was afraid that he would surpass the top Returning Realm Combat Power and possess a part of the Domain Ancestor power.

With such strength, I am afraid that it is comparable to the Wind Mountain Lord who is fully powerful!

Of course, he hadn't fought against the Wind Mountain Lord, so he didn't know who was strong and who was weak.

However, he felt that the Wind Mountain Lord was very mysterious, very not simple, and maybe it was not at the level of the One Realm.

Because, he had scanned the Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain with his copying talent many times, and the strange thing was that he didn't scan any talent, which was very abnormal.

He believed in the power of the copying talent, and even if it was the Guiyi Realm, he couldn't hide the copying talent, but the Wind Mountain Lord didn't have the talent.

Well, there are several possibilities.

The first is that the Wind Mountain Lord is not the main body, but just a clone, so there is no talent.

The second is that the Wind Mountain Lord has a special treasure on his body, which can shield the exploration of the copying talent, but the possibility of this situation is not very high.

If the Wind Mountain Lord is really just a clone, then his body is most likely a domain ancestor.

"The mountain lord of Fengshan rarely makes a move, but if he can, he won't make a move. The last time he faced the Devouring Clan's invasion, he had no choice but to make a move, and other times he didn't seem to have made a move. Otherwise, with his combat power, he would easily crush the Heavenly Emperor Palace!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After Ouyang Jiu'er left, Ye Tian came to Fengshan Mountain.

Today, he came here for two purposes, one is to witness his strength, and the other is to investigate the situation of the mountain lord of Fengshan Mountain.

When Ye Tian arrived, the Wind Mountain Lord immediately appeared.

After all, Ye Tian was not an ordinary half-step domain ancestor, but a half-step domain ancestor with the combat power of the One Realm, so he naturally had to pay attention to it.
